channel.title: Support Bundles on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Support Bundles on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Upcoming GHES change impacting uploading support bundles
item.description:
GitHub will begin rejecting some GHES support bundle uploads starting August 18, 2026 because of an upcoming security change. Administrators should review the new upload requirements before that date to avoid failed submissions.

  • Source: GitHub
